title: Creamy Copper Indian Cheddar Cheese Curry
description: A festive and nutty Indian dish featuring cheddar cheese and beurre-monte, cooked in a copper pot for a unique flavor and texture, this curry is also anti-inflammatory-friendly.
instructions: Heat the beurre-monte in a copper pot over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to brown.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the turmeric, cumin, and cayenne pepper and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the shredded cheddar cheese and stir until it is melted and smooth.
Add the coconut milk and stir until it is well combined with the cheese mixture.
Add the salt and black pepper and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the curry for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
